# Advocate Sajith - Legal Portfolio

> Expert legal representation in Civil Litigation, Criminal Law, Family & Matrimonial Law, Consumer Disputes, and Property matters.

Advocate Sajith is a leading legal professional practicing at Vanchiyoor Court and Trivandrum District Court, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala.

## Practice Areas
- Civil Litigation (Writ petitions, civil appeals, injunctions, and suits for recovery under CPC)
- Criminal Law (Trial court defense, bail applications, and appellate advocacy under BNS/IPC and BNSS/CrPC)
- Family & Divorce Matters (Mutual consent divorce, child custody, alimony, and partition suits)
- Property & Real Estate Law (Title verifications, land acquisition disputes, tenant eviction, RERA)
- Consumer Disputes (Filing/defending complaints before District, State, and National Commissions)
- Labour & Employment Law
- Corporate & Commercial Law
- Arbitration & Mediation
- Banking & Recovery Matters (DRT, SARFAESI compliance, Section 138 NI Act)

## About the Advocate
Advocate Sajith has over 18 years of experience in litigation, client counseling, and legal consulting. He handles cases independently as well as having previously worked under senior counsel. He is known for ethical legal representation built on preparation and client-first principles.

## Education
- LL.B. - Government Law College, Kozhikode (2006)
- M.A. Economics - Mahatma Gandhi College, Thiruvananthapuram (2001)

## Contact Information
- Location: Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India (Practicing primarily at Vanchiyoor Court / Trivandrum District Court)
- Phone: +91 96333 34556
- Email: advsajithm@gmail.com
